title: Derivative Type
description: What kind of derivative content an installment represents relative to its source installment. The source installment_id must reference an installment within the same response.

enumDescriptions.clip: Short excerpt from the source installment
enumDescriptions.highlight: Editorially curated best-of segment from the source installment
enumDescriptions.recap: Summary of the source installment's content
enumDescriptions.trailer: Promotional content for the source installment
enumDescriptions.bonus: Supplementary content (behind-the-scenes, extended interviews, deleted segments)
